# Sakthivel S — Full-Stack Web Developer & Founder of Updone

> Sakthivel S is a Full-Stack Web Developer from Tamil Nadu, India, and the Founder of Updone (https://updone.in) — a modern technology company building smart digital solutions, SaaS platforms, automation systems, websites and mobile applications for colleges, startups, creators and businesses. He is a B.Tech Artificial Intelligence and Data Science student at Kongu Engineering College.

## Who is Sakthivel S?

- Name: Sakthivel S (also known as Sakthivel)
- Role: Full-Stack Web Developer · Founder of Updone
- Location: Tamil Nadu, India
- Education: B.Tech Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, Kongu Engineering College
- Core skills: React.js, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Firebase, SaaS development, business automation, AI integrations
- Portfolio: https://ceo.updone.in/

## Who is the founder of Updone?

Updone (updone.in) was founded by Sakthivel S. Updone's mission is to simplify
digital experiences through innovation and technology — "Done Right."

## What does Updone do?

- Custom software development and SaaS platforms
- Event management systems (registrations, scheduling, live scoring, analytics)
- Leave management and workflow automation systems
- AI integrations for startups, creators and colleges
- Websites and mobile applications for growing businesses
